verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus Asaph.   Deus deorum Dominus locutus est,  et vocavit terram a solis ortu usque ad occasum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִזְמ֗וֹר לְאָ֫סָ֥ף אֵ֤ל ׀ אֱֽלֹהִ֡ים יְֽהֹוָ֗ה דִּבֶּ֥ר וַיִּקְרָא־אָ֑רֶץ מִמִּזְרַח־שֶׁ֝֗מֶשׁ עַד־מְבֹאֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The mighty God, even the Lord, hath spoken, and called the earth from the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ex Sion species decoris ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִצִּיּ֥וֹן מִכְלַל־יֹ֗פִי אֱלֹהִ֥ים הוֹפִֽיעַ׃
verses.king_james: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God hath shined.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus manifeste veniet ;  Deus noster, et non silebit.  Ignis in conspectu ejus exardescet ;  et in circuitu ejus tempestas valida.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֤בֹ֥א אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וְֽאַל־יֶ֫חֱרַ֥שׁ אֵשׁ־לְפָנָ֥יו תֹּאכֵ֑ל וּ֝סְבִיבָ֗יו נִשְׂעֲרָ֥ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.king_james: Our God shall come, and shall not keep silence: a fire shall devour before him, and it shall be very tempestuous round about him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Advocabit cælum desursum, et terram,  discernere populum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִקְרָ֣א אֶל־הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם מֵעָ֑ל וְאֶל־הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ לָדִ֥ין עַמּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: He shall call to the heavens from above, and to the earth, that he may judge his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregate illi sanctos ejus,  qui ordinant testamentum ejus super sacrificia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִסְפוּ־לִ֥י חֲסִידָ֑י כֹּרְתֵ֖י בְרִיתִ֣י עֲלֵי־זָֽבַח׃
verses.king_james: Gather my saints together unto me; those that have made a covenant with me by sacrifice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et annuntiabunt cæli justitiam ejus,  quoniam Deus judex est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּגִּ֣ידוּ שָׁמַ֣יִם צִדְק֑וֹ כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֓ים ׀ שֹׁפֵ֖ט ה֣וּא סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: And the heavens shall declare his righteousness: for God is judge himself. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audi, populus meus, et loquar ;  Israël, et testificabor tibi :  Deus, Deus tuus ego sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעָ֤ה עַמִּ֨י ׀ וַאֲדַבֵּ֗רָה יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל וְאָעִ֣ידָה בָּ֑ךְ אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֱלֹהֶ֣יךָ אָנֹֽכִי׃
verses.king_james: Hear, O my people, and I will speak; O Israel, and I will testify against thee: I am God, even thy God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non in sacrificiis tuis arguam te ;  holocausta autem tua in conspectu meo sunt semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֣א עַל־זְ֭בָחֶיךָ אוֹכִיחֶ֑ךָ וְעוֹלֹתֶ֖יךָ לְנֶגְדִּ֣י תָמִֽיד׃
verses.king_james: I will not reprove thee for thy sacrifices or thy burnt offerings, to have been continually before me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non accipiam de domo tua vitulos,  neque de gregibus tuis hircos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־אֶקַּ֣ח מִבֵּיתְךָ֣ פָ֑ר מִ֝מִּכְלְאֹתֶ֗יךָ עַתּוּדִֽים׃
verses.king_james: I will take no bullock out of thy house, nor he goats out of thy folds.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam meæ sunt omnes feræ silvarum,  jumenta in montibus, et boves.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־לִ֥י כׇל־חַיְתוֹ־יָ֑עַר בְּ֝הֵמ֗וֹת בְּהַרְרֵי־אָֽלֶף׃
verses.king_james: For every beast of the forest is mine, and the cattle upon a thousand hills.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cognovi omnia volatilia cæli,  et pulchritudo agri mecum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֭דַעְתִּי כׇּל־ע֣וֹף הָרִ֑ים וְזִ֥יז שָׂ֝דַ֗י עִמָּדִֽי׃
verses.king_james: I know all the fowls of the mountains: and the wild beasts of the field are mine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si esuriero, non dicam tibi :  meus est enim orbis terræ et plenitudo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־אֶ֭רְעַב לֹא־אֹ֣מַר לָ֑ךְ כִּי־לִ֥י תֵ֝בֵ֗ל וּמְלֹאָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: If I were hungry, I would not tell thee: for the world is mine, and the fulness thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid manducabo carnes taurorum ?  aut sanguinem hircorum potabo ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֭אוֹכַל בְּשַׂ֣ר אַבִּירִ֑ים וְדַ֖ם עַתּוּדִ֣ים אֶשְׁתֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: Will I eat the flesh of bulls, or drink the blood of goats?

verses.latin_vulgate: Immola Deo sacrificium laudis,  et redde Altissimo vota tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְבַ֣ח לֵאלֹהִ֣ים תּוֹדָ֑ה וְשַׁלֵּ֖ם לְעֶלְי֣וֹן נְדָרֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Offer unto God thanksgiving; and pay thy vows unto the most High:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et invoca me in die tribulationis :  eruam te, et honorificabis me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּ֭קְרָאֵנִי בְּי֣וֹם צָרָ֑ה אֲ֝חַלֶּצְךָ֗ וּֽתְכַבְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: And call upon me in the day of trouble: I will deliver thee, and thou shalt glorify me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peccatori autem dixit Deus : Quare tu enarras justitias meas ?  et assumis testamentum meum per os tuum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָ֤רָשָׁ֨ע ׀ אָ֘מַ֤ר אֱלֹהִ֗ים מַה־לְּ֭ךָ לְסַפֵּ֣ר חֻקָּ֑י וַתִּשָּׂ֖א בְרִיתִ֣י עֲלֵי־פִֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: But unto the wicked God saith, What hast thou to do to declare my statutes, or that thou shouldest take my covenant in thy mouth?

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu vero odisti disciplinam,  et projecisti sermones meos retrorsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֭אַתָּה שָׂנֵ֣אתָ מוּסָ֑ר וַתַּשְׁלֵ֖ךְ דְּבָרַ֣י אַחֲרֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Seeing thou hatest instruction, and castest my words behind thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si videbas furem, currebas cum eo ;  et cum adulteris portionem tuam ponebas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־רָאִ֣יתָ גַ֭נָּב וַתִּ֣רֶץ עִמּ֑וֹ וְעִ֖ם מְנָאֲפִ֣ים חֶלְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: When thou sawest a thief, then thou consentedst with him, and hast been partaker with adulterers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os tuum abundavit malitia,  et lingua tua concinnabat dolos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּ֭יךָ שָׁלַ֣חְתָּ בְרָעָ֑ה וּ֝לְשׁוֹנְךָ֗ תַּצְמִ֥יד מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thou givest thy mouth to evil, and thy tongue frameth deceit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sedens adversus fratrem tuum loquebaris,  et adversus filium matris tuæ ponebas scandalum.
verses.king_james: Thou sittest and speakest against thy brother; thou slanderest thine own mother’s son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc fecisti, et tacui.  Existimasti inique quod ero tui similis :  arguam te, et statuam contra faciem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֤לֶּה עָשִׂ֨יתָ ׀ וְֽהֶחֱרַ֗שְׁתִּי דִּמִּ֗יתָ הֱיֽוֹת־אֶהְיֶ֥ה כָמ֑וֹךָ אוֹכִיחֲךָ֖ וְאֶעֶרְכָ֣ה לְעֵינֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: These things hast thou done, and I kept silence; thou thoughtest that I was altogether such an one as thyself: but I will reprove thee, and set them in order before thine eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Intelligite hæc, qui obliviscimini Deum,  nequando rapiat, et non sit qui eripiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּינוּ־נָ֣א זֹ֭את שֹׁכְחֵ֣י אֱל֑וֹהַּ פֶּן־אֶ֝טְרֹ֗ף וְאֵ֣ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.king_james: Now consider this, ye that forget God, lest I tear you in pieces, and there be none to deliver.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacrificium laudis honorificabit me,  et illic iter quo ostendam illi salutare Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹבֵ֥חַ תּוֹדָ֗ה יְֽכַ֫בְּדָ֥נְנִי וְשָׂ֥ם דֶּ֑רֶךְ אַ֝רְאֶ֗נּוּ בְּיֵ֣שַׁע אֱלֹהִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Whoso offereth praise glorifieth me: and to him that ordereth his conversation aright will I shew the salvation of God.
